message:
feat(sentinel): add SENTINEL command dispatcher

Implement Phase 1 completion with full SENTINEL command surface:
- MYID, MASTERS, MASTER, REPLICAS/SLAVES, SENTINELS
- MONITOR, REMOVE, SET, RESET
- GET-MASTER-ADDR-BY-NAME, CKQUORUM
- FAILOVER, FLUSHCONFIG, PENDING-SCRIPTS
- INFO-CACHE, DEBUG, HELP

All 12 unit tests pass covering command dispatch, state management,
and glob pattern matching for RESET command.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
